_comment: Single source of truth for the LuaSwift test matrix, shared by scripts/test-config.sh (local runs) and the GitHub CI workflow (.github/workflows/ci.yml). Two dependency groups model the two distinct testing shapes the build needs.
_optional_dependencies_comment: Sibling-clone dependencies (ChrisGVE Swift packages consumed from a checkout next to LuaSwift, not from a registry). These drive the combinatorial 2^n on/off matrix because each is an independently optional module whose interactions matter. All are default-OFF (opt-in). 'needs_clone: true' means a sibling git checkout is required before building.
_toggle_dependencies_comment: Pure SwiftPM dependencies fetched from a registry — no sibling clone needed (needs_clone: false, no repo). These are NOT folded into the 2^n combinatorial matrix: each is exercised as a single explicit toggle that flips it away from its default, which is the path the default matrix never covers. Yams is default-ON (opt-out via LUASWIFT_INCLUDE_YAMS=0); TOMLKit is default-OFF (opt-in via LUASWIFT_INCLUDE_TOMLKIT=1). 'test_value' is the non-default value to exercise.

toggle_dependencies.name: Yams
toggle_dependencies.description: YAML support; default-ON, this toggle builds the no-YAML path

toggle_dependencies.name: TOMLKit
toggle_dependencies.description: TOML support; default-OFF, this toggle builds the with-TOML path
